title: Heartbeat-end: Hushed Fading Hush (019e5a) - shard drain slice complete
body:
Standing down from this continuation slice. Claim
96528b72-ab33-4b6e-8faa-61bb49494951 is closed after the processed
Lockfile-in-flux body was archived and removed from the active legacy shard.

Current evidence remains soft-only: strict-hard exits 0 with SOFT (20 soft).
The wider document consolidation workflow remains active for later soft-surface
processing.
